description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code for security vulnerabilities. Run the analysis on every push to any branch, on pull requests to any branch except for certain file paths, and on a weekly schedule. Use an ubuntu-18.04 job that checks out the repository with a fetch depth of 2, installs required dependencies, initializes CodeQL for C++ with security and quality queries, builds the code with Ninja, and performs the CodeQL analysis.
